message:
fix(builder): wire global_queue_limit and instantiate deadline_monitor (bd-2wds9)

Two builder.rs bugs from the audit were still unfixed:

1. global_queue_limit was configured but never forwarded to the scheduler.
   Now wired via scheduler.set_global_queue_limit(). The scheduler emits a
   trace warning when the ready queue depth hits the limit (task is still
   scheduled to preserve structured concurrency). GlobalInjector gains a
   ready_count() method backed by AtomicUsize for O(1) depth checks.

2. deadline_monitor was configured but the background thread was never
   spawned. RuntimeInner now starts a monitoring thread that periodically
   calls DeadlineMonitor::check() against the task table, with proper
   shutdown signaling and thread join in Drop.

Extracted create_blocking_pool() and start_deadline_monitor() helpers from
RuntimeInner::new() to stay under the clippy::too_many_lines limit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
